Class SaveEventRequest

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Request body for updating an event (see SaveEvent(SaveEventRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

public class SaveEventRequest
Inheritance
object
